approvedBy: Steve May 18 Foundation continuous-builder priority approval + Codex senior-engineer main-session plan review
approvalSource: Steve prioritized root file and closeout registry cleanup over 3K/5K before agent gates, with commit/push required per completed card.
scopeSummary: Split the static Foundation backlog seed root into bounded chunks while preserving the backlogSeed import contract and verifier source-bundle truth.
constraints: Do not change backlog card semantics or seed row content.
Do not bootstrap, repair, sync, or overwrite live Postgres backlog truth.
Do not run auth-required or paid jobs.
No external sends, Drive permission mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, or Agent Feedback auto-send.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not work MEETING-VAULT-ACL-001 Phase B.
